remaining_tasks.name: 999.0.6 followup: Auto-generate thumbnails on cover upload + backfill existing charts

decisions.decision: Presigned URLs resolved server-side in page.tsx, passed as Record<string,string> to client components
decisions.rationale: Keeps R2 credentials server-only, avoids client waterfall

decisions.decision: CoverThumbnail extracted as separate client component with onError fallback
decisions.rationale: Needs useState for error tracking, reused in list and detail pages

decisions.decision: Thumbnail generation needs to be called after confirmUpload for cover images
decisions.rationale: generateThumbnail exists but is never invoked — coverThumbnailUrl is null for all charts

next_action: Wire generateThumbnail call into the cover image upload flow (after confirmUpload succeeds for coverImageUrl field), then backfill the 2 existing charts. Also use coverImageUrl as fallback when coverThumbnailUrl is null.
context_notes: All 5 planned backlog fixes are done and pushed. During testing, discovered that chart thumbnails show placeholder icons because coverThumbnailUrl is null — generateThumbnail() exists in upload-actions.ts but is never called. The fix is to call it after confirmUpload for cover images, and add a fallback to use coverImageUrl when thumbnail is missing.
